Updated homepage nav to have a fixed 1200px width container with 64px height and increased logo to 32px bold Poppins font. _(Confidence: high)_
Updated homepage footer phrases to use Inter font at 18px medium weight with #F4F4F5 color, -0.06em letter-spacing, 1.3em line-height, and 3000ms rotation interval. _(Confidence: high)_
Changed homepage hero typography to Inter font (Semibold) with -0.06em letter-spacing and 1.2 line-height for both eyebrow and headline, updated hero container padding to 0/24/24/24, and added max-width 1200px container for the hero content. _(Confidence: high)_
